pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and JHipster dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not support Java 21 features or may have compatibility issues with updated dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Jackson JAXB annotations module with Jakarta XML Bind annotations module for Java EE to Jakarta EE migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed in Java 11 and replaced with jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+. Using the old module will cause runtime errors or missing class exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the release flag for Java 9+ cross-compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in favor of the release option in modern Java compilers. While not strictly a compile error, it is the correct modern practice and required for proper module path handling in newer JDKs.
